<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\HttpKernel\Controller; use Symfony\Component\HttpFoundation\Request; use Symfony\Component\HttpKernel\ControllerMetadata\ArgumentMetadata; /** * Responsible for resolving the value of an argument based on its metadata. * * @author Nicolas Grekas <p@tchwork.com> */ interface ValueResolverInterface { /** * Returns the possible value(s). */ public function resolve(Request $request, ArgumentMetadata $argument): iterable; }
